name_cn:
【Highest Market Version, Welcome to Compare】
This Rider Backpack features a minimalist silhouette and a classic academic style full of vitality. Inspired by the Dior men's collection, it reinterprets black-grey and black jacquard fabric with Oblique print throughout. Continuing the classic design with exquisite details like a double zipper closure, a large front zipper pocket, and an adjustable padded shoulder strap, it is an ideal choice for daily styling.
Back reinforced with padded mesh fabric, embossed DIOR logo
Front metal-plated metal DIOR logo
Double zipper closure
Black nylon adjustable padded shoulder strap with black calfskin details
Top leather handle
Front zipper pocket
Internal slip pocket
Model: 1VOBA088#(Small)
Dimensions: 26 x 37 x 15 cm
